issues.detail: The instructions lack explicit guidance on how to apply the provided code snippets, making it ambiguous for users.
The skill does not address error handling or edge cases beyond basic optional Grok matches, leaving potential gaps in robust pipeline configuration.

scenarios.name: Nginx pipeline with geoip and useragent enrichment
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses beats input on 5044, an inline Grok pattern for nginx fields plus geoip and useragent filters, and a daily Elasticsearch index template; baseline gets the structure but misses field-typed Grok captures and rotation index.

scenarios.name: Multi-pipeline with persisted Kafka audit queue
scenarios.rationale: Treatment configures pipelines.yml with per-pipeline workers/batch sizes plus queue.type: persisted and queue.max_bytes: 4gb on the Kafka-fed audit pipeline; baseline mentions multiple pipelines but rarely sets the persisted-queue settings correctly.
